overall.description: A ship simulator game showing nighttime harbor navigation from the vessel's bridge. The camera remains fixed inside the bridge showing three navigation displays overhead while the ship moves slowly through a harbor channel with industrial structures visible on the shoreline.

events.description: windshield wipers sweep across the front window clearing spray
windshield wipers sweep across the window again

agents.ego_description: piloting the vessel through the harbor channel at slow speed, monitoring navigation displays

entered.detail: GPS chart plotter showing harbor map with vessel position
circular radar display with rotating sweep showing channel boundaries
depth sounder showing water depth and bottom contour
illuminated front deck of the vessel with railings and navigation lights
distant industrial lights along the right shoreline

segments.scene_description: The segment opens from the ship's bridge with three navigation displays visible overhead. The vessel moves slowly through the harbor at night, with windshield wipers activating twice to clear spray from the front windows. Industrial lights are visible on the starboard shoreline in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow harbor channel with industrial docks

events.description: large white warehouse building becomes prominent on starboard side

agents.ego_description: continuing through the harbor channel, passing close to dock structures on the right

entered.detail: large illuminated industrial warehouse with flat roof on the dockside
distant lights visible on the port side shoreline

segments.scene_description: The vessel continues through the narrower section of the harbor channel, passing a large white warehouse building on the starboard side. The navigation displays remain visible overhead as the ship progresses past industrial dock structures, with new lights becoming visible on the port side.

agents.ego_description: navigating through the wider section of the harbor toward open water

entered.detail: scattered lights from distant shoreline buildings on the horizon
small illuminated marker buoy visible on the port side

segments.scene_description: The ship moves into a wider section of the harbor channel, leaving the industrial dock structures behind. The view opens up to show distant shoreline lights on the horizon and a navigation buoy on the port side, while the vessel continues its slow forward progress through the calm water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward progression from the ship's bridge as the vessel navigates from a narrow industrial corridor into an open harbor expanse at night. It begins with three navigation displays visible overhead while windshield wipers clear spray from the windows, revealing distant industrial lights on the starboard shoreline. As the ship moves deeper into the channel, the view shifts to pass a large white warehouse and various dock structures on the starboard side before new lights emerge on the port side. The scene then opens up as the vessel leaves the industrial zone behind, transitioning into a wider section of the harbor. Finally, the perspective expands toward the horizon, passing a navigation buoy on the port side while gliding through calm waters toward distant shoreline lights.
